title: Zero Waste Certificates
content:
As Üsküdar University, we also support the Zero Waste project, which was initiated by the Ministry of Environment and Urbanization in June 2017 within the framework of sustainable development principles in order to control waste and leave a clean, developed and livable world for future generations.

Üsküdar University, which established a Zero Waste Management System in accordance with the Zero Waste Regulation published in the Official Gazette dated July 12, 2019 and numbered 30829, was entitled to receive a Zero Waste Certificate on June 8, 2021 with this initiative.

Here are the Zero Waste Certificates of Üsküdar University campuses and NP Feneryolu and NP Etiler Medical Centers.

T.C. Üsküdar University Zero Waste Certificate

T.C.Üsküdar University Çarşı Campus Zero Waste Certificate

T.C.Üsküdar University South Campus Zero Waste Certificate

T.C.Üsküdar University Faculty of Medicine Zero Waste Certificate

T.C.Üsküdar University NP Feneryolu Medical Center Zero Waste Certificate

T.C.Üsküdar University NP Etiler Medical Center Zero Waste Certificate
